name: Temptation Island (RO)
overview: Couples, temptations and an island full of traps, these are the key elements of the reality show presented by Radu Vâlcan. In the end, only true love can pass the test, and the couples entering the competition will find out if they are connected only by habit or, on the contrary, by sincere and strong feelings. The ultimate test of love and trust will be given by the couples who will return from Thailand totally changed.

trailers.title: Testul suprem al iubirii! Paradis când iubești, infern când trădezi!👀

Doar 4 zile ne mai despart de MAREA PREMIERĂ a sezonului 7!😍
